Wed, Oct 8, 2025 · 6:30 PM to 9:00 PM COT

Cra. 7 #116-50

Carrera 7 #116-50 · Bogotá, Us

Bogotá dbt Meetup
D

Hosted by Diego Mauricio Medina P. and Juan David R.

Bogotá dbt Meetup
4.6

Details

Reserve your seat for the next Bogotá dbt Meetup hosted by Factored!
dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks focus on community members’ experiences with dbt, but you’ll also hear presentations on analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🏠 Venue Host: WeWork Usaquén, Carrera 7 #116-50 Edificio Flormorado
🍕 Catering: Pizza & Beers
🤝 Organizer: Factored
⏰ Time: 6:30pm – 9:00pm

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation:
https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

***

### 📣 Agenda and additional details below:

6:30 pm – 7:00 pm Check-in / Registration
7:00 pm – 7:15 pm Welcome Remarks
7:15 pm – 7:35 pm Talk #1 + Q&A
7:35 pm – 7:55 pm Talk #2 + Q&A
7:55 pm – 8:00 pm Closing Remarks and call for speakers for next time
8:00 pm – 8:45 pm Reception (Networking)

***

### 🗣️ Talk #1: “dbt Project Structuring at Scale”

Speaker: Juan Ballesteros

Learn best practices for architecting dbt projects that serve analytics data products across multiple business units while maintaining code quality and team collaboration. This session covers proven strategies for organizing models, implementing governance frameworks, and establishing modular structures that enable departments to work independently. A real-world case study demonstrates how these practices are successfully applied in an enterprise environment.

Speaker Bio: Staff Analytics Engineer with 7+ years of experience. Worked in e-commerce, e-groceries, digital marketing, and fintech industries. dbt certified developer, proficient in Airflow, Python, and Snowflake. Optimized and refactored transformation layers since 2022.

***

### 🗣️ Talk #2: “Gobernanza sin fricción: control de acceso con dbt y AWS Lake Formation”

Speaker: Juan David Corchuelo

Descubre cómo pasar de un gobierno de datos con reglas centralizadas a habilitar que los equipos mismos gestionen el acceso seguro a nivel de columna con dbt y Lake Formation. Verás cómo esta práctica habilita un consumo ágil y seguro de los datos desde herramientas como QuickSight y Metabase.

Speaker Bio: Ingeniero de Sistemas con Maestría en Ingeniería y Analítica de Datos, certificado como AWS Solution Architect-Associate. Apasionado por diseñar arquitecturas de datos en la nube y convertir los datos en valor estratégico para las organizaciones.

***

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝 For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-colombia channel in dbt Slack: https://slack.getdbt.com/

***

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 40,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Details

Reserve your seat for the next Bogota dbt meetup on the 22nd of April 2025 hosted by Factored!
dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🏠Venue Host: We Work Usaquén, Carrera 7 #116-50 Edificio Flormorado
🍕Catering: Pizza & Beers
🤝Organizer: Factored (https://factored.ai/)
⏰ Time: 6:30pm - 9:00pm

*To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: ***https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

📣 Agenda and additional details below:

6:30 pm - 7:00 pm Check in/Registration
7:00 pm - 7:15 pm Welcome Remarks
7:15 pm - 7:35 pm Talk #1 + Q&A
7:35 pm - 7:55 pm Talk #2 + 1 Q&A
7:55 pm - 8:00 pm Closing Remarks and call for speakers for next time.
8:00 pm - 8:45 pm | Reception (45 min)

🗣️Talk #1: dbt en Inteligencia de Negocios: Mejora las fuentes de datos y su gobernanza
Exploraremos el impacto de dbt en la creación de marts de reporting eficientes y su papel en la gobernanza de datos. Examinaremos cómo las capacidades de dbt como la trazabilidad de los datos, las transformaciones modulares, el control de versiones y las funciones de colaboración simplifican el desarrollo de marts de reporting confiables y consistentes.
By Sebastian Clavijo - Analista de Datos en Factored, magíster en ingeniería industrial y apasionado por los datos, la inteligencia de negocios y la visualización de datos.

🗣️Talk #2: Transformando Datos con Seguridad: Data Masking, Modelado y Insights con dbt y Databricks
Acompáñanos en esta charla donde aprenderás cómo utilizar dbt para implementar técnicas de data masking y convertir datos sin procesar en insights valiosos dentro de Databricks. Exploraremos cómo dbt ayuda a proteger información sensible mientras cumple con regulaciones de privacidad, además de compartir mejores prácticas para la carga y procesamiento eficiente de datos en Databricks. También veremos cómo dbt facilita el modelado de datos, permitiendo que equipos multidisciplinarios obtengan insights accionables. Ya seas ingeniero de datos, analista o un apasionado de dbt, esta sesión te proporcionará consejos prácticos y ejemplos reales para optimizar tus pipelines de datos con dbt. ¡No te pierdas esta oportunidad de conectar con otros profesionales y ampliar tu expertise en dbt y Databricks!
By Daniel Lopez de Factored - Data Analyst with a strong focus on data transformation and modeling using dbt. I leverage dbt to structure, clean, and optimize data for seamless integration with visualization tools like Tableau, Looker, and Power BI. I love playing football and volleyball, enjoying the teamwork and strategy both sports bring.

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-colombia channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs)
Network event

99 attendees from 54 groups hosting

D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Bogotá dbt Meetup
4.6
10 reviews
Details

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

Reserve your seat for the next Bogota dbt meetup on the 29th of October 2024 hosted by Factored! dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🏠Venue Host: We Work Usaquén, Carrera 7 #116-50 Edificio Flormorado
🍕Catering: Pizza & Beers
🤝Organizer: Factored (https://factored.ai/)
⏰ Time: 6:30pm - 9:00pm

*To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: ***https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

📣 Agenda and additional details below:

6:30 pm - 7:00 pm Check in/Registration
7:00 pm - 7:15 pm Welcome Remarks
7:15 pm - 7:35 pm Talk #1 + Q&A
7:35 pm - 7:55 pm Talk #2 + 1 Q&A
7:55 pm - 8:00 pm Closing Remarks and call for speakers for next time.
8:00 pm - 8:45 pm | Reception (45 min)

🗣️Talk #1: Generación de Datos Sintéticos en dbt: Extrayendo Valor de Datos No Estructurados con LLMs
Descubre cómo integrar modelos de lenguaje de gran tamaño (LLMs) en tu flujo de trabajo de dbt para transformar datos no estructurados en información valiosa. En esta charla, aprenderás a conectar dbt con la API de OpenAI, desarrollar modelos en Python y procesar grandes volúmenes de texto, convirtiéndolos en datos estructurados listos para el análisis. Ya seas ingeniero de datos, analista o científico de datos, obtendrás herramientas prácticas para optimizar tus pipelines y extraer insights clave de datos complejos, revolucionando tu enfoque hacia el procesamiento de datos. ¡No te lo pierdas!
By María Alejandra Perpiñán Barrios de La Haus- Data Analyst: Soy Ingeniera de Petróleos con especialización en Estadística y actualmente trabajo como Analista de Datos en La Haus, donde lidero proyectos que integran inteligencia artificial y análisis avanzado de datos para generar insights valiosos para el área de producto.

🗣️Talk #2: Creación de métricas por medio de dbt
En esta charla, aprenderás a usar dbt para transformar datos y calcular métricas de negocio de forma óptima, creando un flujo de trabajo eficiente con herramientas como dbt, Snowflake, Bitbucket y Git. Exploraremos los pasos clave y cómo superar desafíos comunes, ofreciendo soluciones prácticas para una gestión de datos que impulse la toma de decisiones empresariales.
By Miguel Alfonso Reyes Gallego de Inisoft - Soy un ingeniero mecánico bilingüe con experiencia en ingeniería de datos, análisis de datos, BI, estrategia, operaciones y visualización de datos, enfocado en sectores como e-commerce, B2B, B2C, productos de consumo masivo y servicios financieros.

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-colombia channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

Reserve your seat for the next Bogota dbt meetup on the 26th of June 2024 hosted by Factored! dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🏠Venue Host: We Work Usaquén, Carrera 7 #116-50 Edificio Flormorado
🍕Catering: Pizza & Beers
🤝Organizer: Factored (https://factored.ai/)
⏰ Time: 6:30pm - 9:00pm

📣 Agenda and additional details below:

6:30 pm - 7:00 pm Check in/Registration
7:00 pm - 7:15 pm Welcome Remarks
7:15 pm - 7:35 pm Talk #1 + Q&A
7:35 pm - 7:55 pm Talk #2 + 1 Q&A
7:55 pm - 8:00 pm Closing Remarks and call for speakers for next time.
8:00 pm - 8:45 pm | Reception (45 min)

🗣️Talk #1: Mastering Multitenant Orchestration with dbt and Dagster
Facing the challenge of synthesizing actionable insights from over hundreds of production databases? Discover proven strategies and innovative solutions in our upcoming session.
By Andrea Montes from Yello - Senior Data Engineer with a deep passion for data-driven insights, Andrea has pioneered innovative solutions that power decision-making.

🗣️Talk #2: Streamlining Tableau Dashboard Deployment with dbt
Maintaining dashboards gets more complicated as companies grow and business logic is embedded across different places. We will see how dbt can aid in dashboard deployment by consolidating dispersed domain knowledge, in order to increase data reliability, metric consistency and easier dashboard maintenance.
By Sebastian Quintero from Factored - A physicist that found his way in the world of data. With over 5 years of experience, he is now working as an Data Analyst / Analytics Engineer in the fintech industry, providing scalable and optimized data products to drive business decision making

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-colombia channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).
----------------------------------
dbt is a data transformation framework that lets analysts and engineers collaborate using their shared knowledge of SQL. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust.

Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Thu, Mar 21, 2024 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM COT

Cra. 7 #116-50

Carrera 7 #116-50 · Bogotá, Us

Bogotá dbt Meetup
J

Hosted by Juan David R. and dbt L.

dbt L. is a Super Organizer

Bogotá dbt Meetup
4.6
10 reviews
Details

Reserve your seat for the next Bogota dbt meetup on the 21th of March 2024 hosted by Factored! dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🏠Venue Host: We Work Usaquén, Carrera 7 #116-50 Edificio Flormorado
🍕Catering: Pizza & Beers
🤝Organizer: Factored (https://factored.ai/)
⏰ Time: 6:30pm - 9:00pm

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb

📣 Agenda and additional details below:

6:30 pm - 7:00 pm Check in/Registration
7:00 pm - 7:15 pm Welcome Remarks
7:15 pm - 7:35 pm Talk #1 + Q&A
7:35 pm - 7:55 pm Talk #2 + 1 Q&A
7:55 pm - 8:00 pm Closing Remarks and call for speakers for next time.
8:00 pm - 8:45 pm | Reception (45 min)

🗣️Talk #1: dbt at the Data Strategy Center: Success Stories and Improvements
It will be explained how the implementation of dbt in our organization has redefined the roles between data analysts and engineers, optimizing the team and reducing costs and execution times in Snowflake. You will discover the keys to our data architecture and how dbt has facilitated efficient dataset management, improving documentation and table maintenance. Join us to discover the real impact of dbt aligned with business strategy and innovation in data visualization.
By Edison Ortiz from La Haus - Systems Engineer focused on innovation and the design of data-driven solutions. I like sports, horses and exploring technologies.

🗣️Talk #2: Beyond the WHY: Unveiling the WHAT and HOW of dbt
So, you have already heard and read a lot about dbt and how it is dramatically changing the data industry landscape for the better. But now you ask yourself: How does dbt work? What does dbt do under the hood? How can I start learning and working with it and benefiting from all the advantages I’ve been hearing about? We will explore all of this during this talk. We will have a live demo of dbt, and then we will drill down into some of its internals to really grasp the importance of this amazing tool. Finally I’ll give you some hints and resources to continue on your dbt learning path. And as a bonus, all the code used during this talk will be available to you so you can replicate what we did, and experiment with dbt in any way you can imagine.
By David Flechas from Factored - An Analytics Engineer from Factored, he is passionate about contributing value to companies one data transformation at a time. He is also enthusiastic about traveling and mountain biking

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-colombia channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

Reserve your seat for the first Bogota dbt meetup on the 10th of August 2023 host by Factored! dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🏠Venue Host: We Work Usaquén, Carrera 7 #116-50 Edificio Flormorado
🍕Catering: Pizza & Beers

6:30 pm - 7:00 pm Check in/Registration

8:00 pm - 8:45 pm | Reception (45 min)

🗣️Talk #1: Data landscape has rapidly evolved in the last 10 years. From a Hadoop-centered ecosystem to the modern data stack, what are the upcoming trends we expect to see in the future? Join me to this journey through the past and present of the data ecosystem to understand data industry’s big picture. Spoiler alert: We’re going to talk about dbt, generative AI and other hot trends.
By Andres Luna - A lifelong learner data engineer, passionated about automation, DataOps and the future of data architectures.

🗣️Talk #2: Let's discuss the importance of data transformation pipelines for companies. These pipelines can streamline data processing, improve decision-making, and give businesses a competitive edge. Join me to learn about the most common problems companies face when dealing with transformations at scale and how well-implemented pipelines solve them.
By Sebastian Ballesteros - A Data scientist with a passion for data modeling, feature engineering, and natural language processing. I believe end-to-end automated data pipelines are what all industries need in their core infrastructure.
